inputs.titre: Dépôt du brevet de la machine à voter

reason: The image depicts a scene that aligns well with the 1869 setting of the patenting of the voting machine. The clothing (bowler hats, morning coats, starched shirts), the architecture (brick walls, high arched windows), the lighting (gas lamps), and the black iron voting machine itself all suggest the late 19th century. The overall atmosphere feels appropriate for the time. While the image has a slightly 'too perfect' quality common to AI-generated images, there are no obvious anachronisms or fantastical elements that disqualify it.
